title: Bitter Dense Romantic Mexican Bell Pepper Stir-fry
description: A romantic vegan dish featuring bitter bell peppers in a dense sauce made with white wine vinegar and reduced vegetable broth.
instructions: Clean and slice the bell peppers into thin strips.
In a medium saucepan, combine the vegetable broth and water. Bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce heat to low, add garlic cloves, serrano peppers (if using), and vegan white wine vinegar. Simmer for about 10 minutes until the liquid reduces by half.
Add olive oil to a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add bell pepper strips and cook until slightly charred on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove peppers from heat and add them back into the reduced sauce in the pan. Stir well to combine with the peppers.
Season with salt to taste and a few drops of fresh lime juice. Serve hot as a main dish or side.
Optional: Garnish with chopped cilantro for added flavor.
